{{nihongo|'''Kahisaya Shrine'''|加久弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kahisaya Shrine'''|加久弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 加久弥神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Kahisaya Shrine'''|加久弥神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
